title: Article Digest
scenario: Digest a 500-word opinion piece on a current event. The summary should be 1-2 paragraphs long, include the author's opinion, and the main points made. Use an objective tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary adheres to the word limit and tone requirements.
Verify that the summary includes the author's opinion and the main points made.
Check if the tone of the summary matches an objective tone.
